_comment: Catalogue of chess engines the player can run. Each entry runs on a binary COMPILED INTO the app (Stockfish). 'net' (a .nnue file) and 'uci' (option overrides) are DATA and may be added/downloaded as packs without an app update - this is what keeps 'install engines from inside the app' App Store-compliant (Guideline 2.5.2 bans downloading executable code). catalog_url: set to a hosted catalog to serve packs remotely; leave empty to serve the BUNDLED catalog (assets/engines/catalog.json), whose packs download nets straight from public net servers.

engines.name: Stockfish 18
engines.author: The Stockfish team · GPLv3
engines.description: A full Stockfish 18 build with its embedded NNUE evaluation, running entirely offline on your device. Powers every bot tier from Beginner to Max Stockfish.
